name: A Survey on the Verification of Reinforcement Learning Policies

description: arXiv:2607.16210v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) is increasingly applied in complex, safety-critical domains, yet the lack of rigorous behavioral guarantees for neural network-based policies remains a major barrier to deployment. Recent advances in policy expressiveness and scale have intensified this challenge, leading to a rapidly growing but conceptually fragmented...
author: Luca Marzari, Ezio Bartocci, Enrico Marchesini
